_comment: Editorial ingest feed registry. Adding an outlet = adding an object here, NOT code. format: json (JSON Feed v1.1) | xml (RSS/Atom). type: reviews | awards | festival (a hint; the per-item classifier is authoritative — an award headline on a reviews feed still becomes a highlight). enabled=false rows are parsed by nobody; kept as documentation of what was tried. Verified 2026-07-02 via reachability/shape check.

feeds.name: NYT Movies
feeds.note: UNVERIFIED — host refused our reachability fetch (bot filtering). Historically a stable RSS feed; re-verify from a real client before enabling.

feeds.name: Times of India Movie Reviews
feeds.note: UNVERIFIED — host refused our reachability fetch. Confirm this is the movie-reviews feed id before enabling.

feeds.name: Variety Film
feeds.note: DEAD for us — 307-redirects to tollbit.variety.com (Tollbit bot-wall). Not machine-fetchable without a paid Tollbit key.

feeds.name: IndieWire
feeds.note: DEAD for us — 307-redirects to tollbit.indiewire.com (Tollbit bot-wall).

feeds.name: Lensman
feeds.note: FLAGGED — outlet named in the brief but no feed URL known. Not guessed. Supply a URL to enable.
